javadoc_before:
/** * Gets the base name (i.e. the part up to and not including the last ".") of the last path segment of a file name. *

* Will return the file name itself if it doesn't contain any dots. All leading directories of the {@code file name} parameter are skipped. *

* * @return the base name of file name * @param path the path of the file to obtain the base name of. * @since 1.22 */
javadoc_after:
/** * Gets the base name (i.e. the part up to and not including the last ".") of the last path segment of a file name. *

* Will return the file name itself if it doesn't contain any dots. All leading directories of the {@code file name} parameter are skipped. *

* * @return the base name of file name * @param path the path of the file to obtain the base name of. * @since 1.22 * @deprecated Use {@link PathUtils#getBaseName(Path)}. */
